input.subject: Re: RFQ — ISO 26262 ASIL-D safety analysis proposal
input.body:
Dear AutomoTech Procurement Team,

Thank you for your RFQ regarding the ISO 26262:2018 safety analysis for the brake controller ECU.

We have reviewed the technical specification and are pleased to submit our proposal for an ASIL-D engagement covering HARA, Functional Safety Concept, System FMEA, and safety case documentation.

Proposed timeline: 14 weeks
Estimated effort: 320 person-hours

Please find our detailed proposal attached.

Best regards,
Jarvis Safety Consulting

job_result.summary: Created draft "Re: RFQ — ISO 26262 ASIL-D safety analysis proposal" to procurement@automotech.com.
